feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: can inspection lot results be carried to other plant with same batch
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have scenario where we do STO between plants (produce and inspect at origin plant ). However, I do not want to repeat inspecting the material at the destination plant after GR.

Please note we use same batch number for GI & GR (from origin plant and destination plant) and for STO process we use both 641 and 643 movement types.

I would like to know :

  1. Is there any SAP standard functionality where I can get inspection lot results from origin plant since I am using same batch (both at origin and destination plants) without repeating inspection/UD/result entry at destination plant.
  2. If I have to go with a custom solution, I believe I can trace the inspection lot results using Batch number and plant combination, please correct me if I am wrong.

Your help is much appreciated.

entry.title: F4 Help in Custom Analytic Query
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to create F4 help to Custom analytic query, I added below annotation to make field act as filter but I tried various ways to add Value help but without any success. field is not parameterized, it is made filter by addition below annotation form projection list.

@Consumption.filter: {selectionType: #INTERVAL, multipleSelections: true, mandatory: false}

Can you please guide how to achieve it

Ankesh

entry.title: How is the patch algorithm for CL_ABAP_DIFF?
entry.content:
I was exploring the new system class CL_ABAP_DIFF which detects differences between internal tables. According to the documentation, its return value is a diff table, to be understood as a sequence of instructions that have to be applied to the source table in order to get the target table. 

Unfortunately, my naïve approach to write a `patch` algorithm for applying the diff data to the source table doesn't work. 

       loop at lt_diff assigning field-symbol(<ls_diff>).
         case <ls_diff>-operation.
           when cl_abap_diff=>s_operation-delete.
             delete lt_source index <ls_diff>-source_line_number.
           when cl_abap_diff=>s_operation-insert.
             insert lt_target[ <ls_diff>-target_line_number ] 
               into lt_source index <ls_diff>-source_line_number.
           when cl_abap_diff=>s_operation-update.
             modify lt_source 
               from lt_target[ <ls_diff>-target_line_number ] 
               index <ls_diff>-source_line_number.
         endcase.
       endloop.

Any suggestions how to fix this patch algorithm so that after the loop we have lt_source = lt_target?

entry.title: Quote comparison in sap
entry.content: Quote Comparison in SAP.

entry.title: GUI Z Report in Fiori launch pad
entry.content:
Hi All, 

In S4HANA 2020 there is a Z Report working fine in GUI, it is possible to view the same in the Fiori launch pad as a Tile or App. 

Regards

entry.title: How to get rid of double tooltips on sALV column header?
entry.content:
Hi guys,

How do I get rid of double tooltips (mouseover texts) on sALV column headers?

What I noticed is that if a column is wide enough, it has a normal tooltip (only one text appears, which seems to be my custom text that I explicitly define via set_long_text method on the column). The same happens if I just manually resize column width to make it wide enough. But I want this tooltip to appear only once regardless of column width. Is this possible?

entry.title: Integration of SAP PI-PP or SAP PI-PCS with Aveva MES
entry.content:
Hi Team,


I just have a quick question, is there any possibility to communicate SAP- PI-PCS with Aveva MES system for the process industry. I want to transfer the manufacturing process values and parameters in addition wants to transfer plant data, production process quality management, order tracking etc from SAP to MES.

I know there is SAP PP module and it has SAP PP-PCS interface to link with the external 3rd parties software. Can anyone help me to figure out the way how can I connect or integrate the SAP PP-PI with Aveva MES.

Any input would be appreciated.

Thanks & Best Regards

SSamber

entry.title: how to use combined determinations ?! #ABAP RAP#
entry.content:
Hey, 

I am currenty trying to convert the currency of an amount of a travel entity once the user changes the fields BookingFee and/or CurrencyCode. Therefore I have implemented the following determination: determination calculateTotalPrice on modify { field BookingFee , CurrencyCode; } in my root behaviour definition. 

The problem is that while debugging I get only the new currency code although for the used function i need both codes : the old and the new one to execute my conversion. So my solution was that i need maybe to implement two determinations the first one reads the old currency code and saves and the other to execute the conversion. Since determinations are independent, does anyone knows how can I use the result of a determination in the next one or is there any other approach that can serve? 

Best regards and thanks in advance 

sisi

entry.title: MIRO BADI using/Calling Fiori custom fields in (DRSEG_CI and CI_DRSEG_CUST)
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

Implementing BADI MRM_ITEM_CUSTFIELDS, we can able to add custom tab and populate the custom fields appended in DRSEG_CI and CI_DRSEG_CUST.  

Since we are in S4 Migration and having Fiori custom fields created by SAP which are maintained in RSEG table, we would like to use the same custom fields for this MIRO enhancement, instead of creating a new one in DRSEG_CI and CI_DRSEG_CUST as it looks a duplicate and problem in syncing the posting data i.e., updating real time live data both in the Fiori custom fields and DRSEG_CI  custom fields. 

Please let me know any suitable solution to use the Fiori custom fields that are created in RSEG table.

@Sandra_Rossi : Need your help. Is it possible or not? Many Thanks.

Thanks in advance.

Kind regards.

entry.title: RAP : Multi Level List (3 level)
entry.content:
Hi,

There seems to be no available documentation on creating Parent-Child-Subchild using the composition and parent associations. On attempting the same, although with the similar code as below, the navigation to the object page of the 3rd level entity does not work on create, and only create a row in the Child 3 level table, without any managed uuid creation or object page navigation:

 

managed;

strict ( 2 );

with draft;

 

define behavior for ZI_G_ROOT alias Root

implementation in class zbp_i_g_Root unique

persistent table ztg_Root

draft table ztg_d_Root

lock master total etag UpdatedDate

authorization master ( instance )

etag master LastLocalUpdateAt

{

create;

update;// ( precheck );

delete;

association _Parent { create; with draft; }

association _Child { with draft; }

field ( numbering : managed, readonly ) RootUuid;

 

draft action Resume;

draft action Edit;

draft action Activate optimized;

draft action Discard;

 

draft determine action Prepare;

}

 

define behavior for ZI_G_PARENT alias Parent

implementation in class zbp_i_g_Parent unique

persistent table ztg_Parent

draft table ztg_d_Parent

lock dependent by _Root

authorization dependent by _Root

etag master LastLocalUpdateAt

{

update;

delete;

association _Child { create; with draft; } 

association _Root { with draft; }

 

field ( numbering : managed, readonly ) ParentUuid;

field ( readonly ) RootUuid;

 

}

 

 

define behavior for ZI_G_CHILD alias _Child

implementation in class zbp_i_g_child unique

persistent table ztg_Child

draft table ztg_d_Child

lock dependent by _Root

authorization dependent by _Root

etag master LastLocalUpdateAt

{

association _Parent { with draft; }

ancestor association _Root { with draft; }

update;

delete;

field ( readonly ) RootUuid, ParentUuid;

field ( numbering : managed, readonly ) ChildUuid;

}

 

There is another way to create hierarchy using node_id and parent_id with hierarchy and source keywords similar to HANA 2.0 functions, but still eventually the Behavior Definition is important.

Is there a documentation of the same somewhere by SAP?

 

 

I look forward to your response.

 

Best Regards,

Ruchir

entry.title: Issue with adding filter and sort options for virtual elements in CDS SAP
entry.content:
Hello All,

There is a CDS view with virtually calculated elements with annotation @ObjectModel.virtualElementCalculatedBy: 'ABAP: CLASS NAME'. 

I wanted to add add filter and sort options for the same using below annotation,

@ObjectModel.filter.transformedBy: 'ABAP: CLASS NAME'

@ObjectModel.sort.transformedBy:'ABAP: CLASS NAME'

Created SE24 class for the same and implemented below Interfaces,

IF_SADL_EXIT_FILTER_TRANSFORM

IF_SADL_EXIT_SORT_TRANSFORM

For filter option implemented IF_SADL_EXIT_FILTER_TRANSFORM~MAP_ATOM method and below is the code added,

For Sort option implemented IF_SADL_EXIT_SORT_TRANSFORM~MAP_ELEMENT method and added below code,

Even after doing adding the code filter and sort options are not working even though these options are visible in application.

Kindly suggest to resolve this issue.

Thanks,

Nitin Kevate

entry.title: Add Column on Report from VA05 transaction Code
entry.content:
Hello community , 

i want on VA05 Result, from execute, to add Salesman on my view.

Can anyone help me to add this Column ?

Needs to make Z Program from "SD_SALES_DOCUMENT_VIEW" from SE38 ?

Maybe i can take this report from other Standard SAP Transaction. We have any Transaction to help me ?

Thanks a lot.

entry.title: MRBR won't release invoice with manual block when called in a custom program.
entry.content:
I have created a program that releases automatic and manually blocked invoices. However, it is not releasing the invoices with manual block. I'm using BDC data to release it in MRBR.

For automatically blocked invoice the BDC data is:

PA_XAUTO = X

PA_XSPGR = X

For manually blocked the BDC data is:

PA_XMANU = X

PA_ZLSPR = X

 

Since I was not able to release the invoice with manual block in my ZPROGRAM, I tried to release in MRBR 

With the parameters of COmpany code, Fiscal YEar, Supplier, and the parameters below and it was successfully released. 

How do I check why I'm getting sy-subrc = 1001 when releasing the invoice using my zprogram? 

Thanks

entry.title: Why can't I add an ABAP Cloud package in the Configure Software Packages application?
entry.content:
Hi all,

why can't I add an ABAP Cloud package (Package with ABAP Language Version - ABAP for Cloud Developent) in the "Configure Software Packages" app?

When I want to register the package I get the message - Package ZPACK cannot be used. Check the settings of software component ZCOMP

I thought the key user extensibility was TIER-1, considering the 3-TIER extensibility. According to this error message, the key user extension would then end up in TIER 2/3, right? 

Hint: I work with S/4 2022 On-Premise

Thank you in advance for your help

regards 

Claus

entry.title: Adding a Value Help for a Standard field in Custom Business Object
entry.content:
Hi Members,

I've created a Custom business object with standard fields in it and one of the field needs a value help which is added by Association to Business Object. I tried referring to a blog 

Adding a Value Help for Custom Business Object fie... - SAP Community

But after following the steps mentioned in it, the value help is not providing any value.

Could anyone help in explaining on how to achieve this

@Cloud @ABAP

entry.title: How to attach custom F4 Search help in Manage Customer Line Items(F0711)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I need to add the custom fields in Manage Customer Line Items(F0711).

For adding the fields in Table and filter bar, I created the project in SEGW and redefined the standard OData service FAR_CUSTOMER_LINE_ITEMS. The custom fields are added in both table and filter bar.

I need to attach F4 search help to custom filter bar fields. 

Kindly Help.

 

Regards,

Tamilselvan

entry.title: Call custom screen and popup in SAP Radio Frequency(RF) Framework
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

I need to make a copy of standard screen into custom and do the required in the screen. I did it and it works as expected in SAP GUI using transaction /SCWM/RFUI.

But when I logged in SAP RF portal on any browser for the transaction /SCWM/RFUI through SICF, it does not work and generating run time error. 

Kindly help.

 

Regards,

Tamilselvan

entry.title: LOAD_PROGRAM_TABLE_MISMATCH error
entry.content:
The "load_program_table_mismatch" error in SAP usually means there's a problem with the versions of some program files not matching up correctly. Here's a simple explanation of why it happens and how to fix it:

Why it happens:
System Update: If your SAP system was recently updated or patched, it might cause some files to be out of sync.
Incomplete Changes: If some program changes weren't properly loaded or imported into the system, this mismatch can occur.
Temporary Issues: Sometimes, the system's temporary memory (called the buffer) might get messed up or outdated.

The "load_program_table_mismatch" error in SAP usually means there's a problem with the versions of some program files not matching up correctly. Here's a simple explanation of why it happens and how to fix it:

Why it happens:
System Update: If your SAP system was recently updated or patched, it might cause some files to be out of sync.
Incomplete Changes: If some program changes weren't properly loaded or imported into the system, this mismatch can occur.
Temporary Issues: Sometimes, the system's temporary memory (called the buffer) might get messed up or outdated.
How to fix it:
Refresh Memory: Clear the system's temporary memory to make it reload the correct versions of the programs.
Re-import Changes: Make sure all changes or updates to the system were fully and correctly applied.
Check for Updates: Look into any recent updates or patches to see if there are known issues or additional steps needed.
System Check: Run a system check to find and fix any inconsistencies.
Solution 1:

Issue: LOAD_PROGRAM_TABLE_MISMATCH

The error occurred because the SAP system was recently updated or patched, causing some files to be out of sync.

The error won't occur after the upgrade process was completed.

Solution 2:

In some cases you need to regenerate specific coding and tables.

Regenerate programs

Use program TOUCHSRC.

Use program name as TOUCHTAB or TOUCHALL and execute.

you'll get the confirmation as Program touched successfully.

entry.title: How do you name your global classes ?
entry.content:
Hi !

Maybe it's a dumb question... But I'm always wondered how others developers named their global classes, because our namespace (Z & Y) is pretty limited since everything created in the repository can be created once (for the same type). I would loved a solution where the namespace is linked to a package and so it will be possible to name 2 repository objects identically into 2 separate package, sweet dream.

Because of this, I often find my self using local classes in my programs, I find them more flexible and I can avoid to pollute unnecessarily the repository with odd names. But there are costs, one of them is reusability. Of course, I create global classe when it's make sense, like business object that I know there will be only one classe like ZCL_EQUIPEMENT or ZCL_DELIVERY (with some exceptions to the rule of course) or classes with clear boundaries.

But what about classes like MODEL / DAO / VIEW / CONTROLLER and so on ? If we are using MVC pattern in our development, we have to deal with this classes in multiples reports, so if global, name conflict may happen when for example 2 MODEL in different applications are created with slightly different interface but with the same semantic.

What are your recommandation about it ?

Thanks !

entry.title: How to pass parameter from parameterized parent view to parameterized child view?
entry.content:
Hi,

I have two CDS-Views with the same Parameters. They have a composition - to parent association constellation.

The parent view will be used to build a Fiori List Report Page (via Elements). The composition view will provide data for the object page.

Problem:

I can't figure out how to pass the parameter from parent view to child view.

Can this be done on the CDS-View level?

See CDS-Views attached.

CDS-View1:

 

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'CDS1'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: false
@Metadata.allowExtensions: true
@OData.publish: true
define root view entity C_VIEW1_Parameterized
  with parameters
    @Consumption.derivation: { lookupEntity: 'C_SglGregorianCalDateFunction',
      resultElement: 'DateFunctionStartDate', binding: [ {
        targetParameter: 'P_DateFunction', type: #PARAMETER, value : 'P_DateFunction' },
         { targetParameter : 'P_Language' , type : #SYSTEM_FIELD, value : '#SYSTEM_LANGUAGE'  } ]
      }
    @Consumption.hidden: true
    P_StartDate    : bedat,

    @Consumption.derivation: { lookupEntity: 'C_SglGregorianCalDateFunction',
    resultElement: 'DateFunctionEndDate', binding: [ {
      targetParameter: 'P_DateFunction', type: #PARAMETER, value : 'P_DateFunction' },
       { targetParameter : 'P_Language' , type : #SYSTEM_FIELD, value : '#SYSTEM_LANGUAGE'  } ]
    }
    @Consumption.hidden: true
    P_EndDate      : bedat,
    @Consumption.defaultValue: 'PREVIOUSYEARTODATE'
    @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{
      entity: {
        name:'C_GregorianCalDateFuncVH',
        element:'DateFunction'
      }
    }]
    p_datefunction : datefunctionid
  as select from I_VIEW_PARAMETERIZED( P_StartDate: $parameters.P_StartDate , P_EndDate: $parameters.P_EndDate)
  composition of C_VIEW2_Parameterized as _cview2
{
  key variable1,
      variable2,
      variable3,
      _cview2  

}

 

CDS-View2:

 

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Test2'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
@Metadata.allowExtensions: true
@OData.publish: true
define view entity CVIEW2_PARAMETERIZED
  with parameters
    P_StartDate    : bedat,
    P_EndDate      : bedat
    p_datefunction : datefunctionid
  as select from I_View2_PARAMETERIZED ( P_StartDate: $parameters.P_StartDate, P_EndDate: $parameters.P_EndDate)
  association to parent C_VIEW1 as _cview1 on $projection.variable1 = _cview1.variable1

{

  key variable1,
  key variable2,
_cview1($parameters.P_EndDate, p_datefunction: $parameters.P_datefunction ).variable3,

      _cview1

}

 

BRG Schoko
